StructurePhase.Reference: Portnoy V.K., Leonov A.V., Fadeeva V.I., Fedotov S.A., Izv. Ross. Akad. Nauk, Ser. Fiz., v71 p1736-1739 (2007)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 1924189. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: ball-milled. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample heated at 1073 K for 2 h. Article Title: Mechanochemical synthesis of phases in the Ni-Al-C system. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: c b. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Johnston R.L., Hoffmann R.D., J. Am. Chem. Soc., v111 p810-819 (1989)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 1620283. Article Title: Superdense Carbon, C8: Supercubane or Analogue of γ-Si. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: c. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Palenzona A., Canepa F., J. Less-Common Met., v157 p307 (1990)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO2. LPF Collection Code: 260923. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:La,Ru. Compound Preparation: semi-levitation-melted. Article Title: THE PHASE DIAGRAMS OF THE La-Ru AND Nd-Ru SYSTEMS. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: c b. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Garde C.S., Ray J., Chandra G., J. Alloys Compd., v198 p165-172 (1993)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO3. LPF Collection Code: 451776. Sample Preparation: COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, several times re-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 773 K for 1 w. Article Title: Resistivity and thermopower studies on La3X (X= Al, Sn, In, Ru, Ir, Co, Ni, Ge, Ga) systems. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: d c2. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
